category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/Flux159/mcp-server-kubernetes documents kubeconfig, Helm, node management, and pod cleanup features.
source_facts.description says this is an MCP server for Kubernetes management commands.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use mcp-server-kubernetes: https://github.com/Flux159/mcp-server-kubernetes
docs_sources: Official GitHub README references ADVANCED_README.md and the docs folder for advanced features and Kubernetes-specific information.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official README references kubeconfig, kubectl connection checks, Helm operations, node management, and pod cleanup docs.
